steps.title: Identify the key action in the examples
steps.content: Both examples show artists “incorporated” and “combined” Indigenous music with other styles — the signal is a merging or blending action.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean blend or merge — both examples show artists combining Indigenous music with other styles into a single work. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — fuse: artists "fuse Indigenous music with other musical styles" — fuse means to merge distinct things into one, which matches incorporating powwow music into electronic dance music. ✓
  • Choice B — exaggerate: artists "exaggerate Indigenous music" — exaggerate means overstate or amplify, not blend with another genre. ✗
  • Choice C — analyze: artists "analyze Indigenous music" — analyze means examine critically, not combine with other styles. ✗
  • Choice D — acquire: artists "acquire Indigenous music" — acquire means obtain or gain possession of, not merge it with another genre. ✗
That is the correct answer.
